##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]Na_2_(Fe^2+^_3_Fe^3+^_2_)Si_8_O_22_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Zagi Mountain, Hameed Abad Kafoor Dheri, Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
